PR branch asserts "pkg:maven/org.apache/commons-lang3@3.12" (versioned only, no qualifiers). assertion_results.text: The test change classification analysis is based on comparing base-branch and PR-branch file content (function additions, removals, assertion changes) — the structural and semantic assessment references test file content, not acceptance criteria or task requirements (constraint 1.18)
assertion_results.evidence: Structural Summary (lines 112-131) enumerates function additions/removals and assertion changes by comparing base and PR branch file content: removed function test_recommend_purls_with_qualifiers, relaxed assertion in test_recommend_purls_basic (base branch PURL 'pkg:maven/org.apache/commons-lang3@3.12?repository_url=...' vs PR branch 'pkg:maven/org.apache/commons-lang3@3.12'), added function test_recommend_purls_dedup, added !contains('?') assertions. Semantic Assessment (lines 133-139) discusses 'On the base branch, the test verified full round-trip fidelity of PURLs' vs 'On the PR branch, the test verifies that qualifiers are actively stripped'. All references are to test file content (function names, assertion strings, PURL values), not to acceptance criteria or task requirements.
